card_description: Karl Barth is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick synthesizes Hegel's "three divisions of religion," placing himself and his 3-74 experience in the highest stage: "Absolute Religion" or Christianity, where the opposition between individuality and nature is overcome in the realization of the Absolute Spirit."
